items.label: Power: UPS / generator / mains verified; no loose IEC
Network: 10G / bond / VLAN matches show diagram; spare SFP+
Vision HTTP /health OK (Server control or Readiness)
NDI: expected sources visible on switcher; aliases if needed
Time: PTP / timecode plan confirmed with facility or grandmaster
Storage: record path free space; NVMe / RAID health
ISO recorder agents: GET /health OK on primary (and backup) bases in recording rack
Warm standby: dashboard URL in server config; promotion / carbon-copy procedure understood
If GPU media mode enabled: gpu-modules page shows required cards online (primary + backup as planned)
If graphics module is used: overlay-modules page reports engine online and output profile validated
Remote operator policy reviewed (CIDR + remote access code) for offsite control users
Thermals: node telemetry fresh; no critical temps in NOC
Agents: metrics posting; command policy known (exec on/off)
WAN / link balancer: profile matches show (if used)
Camera control: VISCA/CCAPI path tested for this show
Config backup taken (Dashboard backup) after final tweaks
Rollback: spare node / image / bypass path agreed with lead
Comms: talkback / IFB routing checked with audio lead
Readiness page: no FAIL on mandatory checks (or waivers documented)
